t-1.notes: feature: native status line · Render @ internal/statusline/render.go · pure core renders line 1 + auto-compact-normalized context meter, byte-faithful to the node reference via node-minted goldens

t-2.notes: feature: native status line · Render @ internal/statusline/render.go · line 2 renders the bold in-progress todo (wins) or dim dross state plus the context meter, byte-faithful to the node reference

t-3.notes: feature: native status line · formatPeers @ internal/statusline/render.go · line 3 renders peer background jobs sorted by attention priority with MDI icons, byte-faithful to the node reference

t-4.notes: feature: native status line · Gather @ internal/statusline/gather.go · resolves render Inputs from stdin + todos/state/jobs/git behind injected env/clock/git seams (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, newest-todo, walk-up, 6h staleness)

t-5.notes: feature: native status line · Statusline @ internal/cmd/statusline.go · the dross statusline command: bounded-stdin, silent-fail, real git runner, wired into main.go

t-6.notes: feature: statusline install wiring · MergeStatusline @ internal/statusline/settings.go · order-preserving settings.json merge/unmerge: opt-in wire, idempotent, refuse-clobber, surgical revert

t-7.notes: feature: statusline install wiring · enableStatuslineIn @ internal/cmd/statusline.go · install --statusline/--no-statusline + statusline enable|disable opt-in/revert over the settings.json merge core, absolute binary path, consent-gated
